evals.prompt: Run recall for the last 7 days and show me what GitHub repos I've been working on
evals.expected_output: Should auto-discover repos with commits in last 7 days, show list of discovered repos, fetch commits from each repo, and include them in the correlation timeline

assertions.name: auto_discovers_repos
assertions.description: Verifies that gh search commits was called to discover repos

assertions.name: displays_discovered_repos
assertions.description: Output shows list of discovered repos (e.g., 'Auto-discovered 3 repos with activity')

assertions.name: fetches_commits_from_all_repos
assertions.description: Commits are fetched from all discovered repos, not just one

assertions.name: includes_commits_in_timeline
assertions.description: Timeline includes GitHub commits with repo names

evals.prompt: Run recall for the last 3 days correlating only the syncopated/robo-synth repo
evals.expected_output: Should use manual repo specification (backward compatibility), skip auto-discovery, fetch commits only from specified repo

assertions.name: skips_autodiscovery
assertions.description: Auto-discovery is not triggered when --github-repo is specified

assertions.name: uses_specified_repo_only
assertions.description: Commits are fetched only from the specified repo (syncopated/robo-synth)

assertions.name: backward_compatible
assertions.description: Behavior matches pre-v1.2.0 when repo is manually specified

evals.prompt: Run recall for the last 14 days but skip all GitHub correlation, I only want local sessions
evals.expected_output: Should skip GitHub entirely (both auto-discovery and manual), include only local sessions and git activity

assertions.name: skips_github_entirely
assertions.description: No gh commands are executed (neither search nor api calls)

assertions.name: includes_local_sessions
assertions.description: Timeline includes sessions from Claude Code, Gemini CLI, etc.

assertions.name: includes_local_git
assertions.description: Timeline includes local git commits from workspace repos

assertions.name: excludes_github_commits
assertions.description: Timeline does not include any GitHub API commits
